opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $47 cover made my destroyed couch look brand new in 3 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Shredded, pet-hair-covered sofa with visible stains and worn fabric that embarrasses guests
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, fitted sofa that looks freshly bought — hair-free, waterproof, guest-ready
opportunities.why_now: Spring pet shedding season peaks in May, driving a surge in pet-hair-solution searches across home subs.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow with cutout
opportunities.transformation_hook: I spent $129 and woke up without neck pain for the first time in 2 years
opportunities.before_state: Waking up with stiff neck, stacked flat pillows that deflate overnight, poor sleep quality
opportunities.after_state: Aligned spine, zero neck pain, sleeping through the night on a pillow designed for side sleepers
buyer_intent_keywords: best pillow for side sleepers neck pain
opportunities.why_now: Work-from-home posture fatigue continues driving neck pain searches, and spring bedroom refresh intent spikes in May.
